caption: A wide shot shows a naval fleet sailing across a calm, blue ocean under a clear sky. Several large gray warships are positioned in a line, moving toward the camera and creating white wakes in the water. In the foreground, a portion of another vessel's deck is visible, featuring specialized equipment including what appears to be a mounted sensor or communication array. A small red circular logo with the white number "13" is located in the upper right corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the warships maintain their steady course, gliding forward across the horizon. No people are visible in the frames. The environment remains consistent with a bright, daytime maritime setting, and there is very little movement other than the forward progression of the ships and the shifting white foam of the wakes.
